sections.heading: S
sections.section_value: The patient reports pain in the left hand, and reports nasal congestion. The patient denies chest pain, abdominal pain, and nausea. The patient reports pain.

sections.heading: O
sections.section_value: Blood pressure is mildly low. Heart rate is within normal limits. Neurologic examination is nonfocal.

sections.heading: A
sections.section_value: The patient has a history of depression and hypertension. He is attending therapy.

sections.heading: P
sections.section_value: The physician orders a mammogram. The physician wants the patient to take lisinopril at a dose of 20 milligrams per day. The physician wants the patient to continue lisinopril.
